home.title: Prediction Markets
home.subtitle: Trade YES/NO on real-world events. Settled in USDC on Arc, resolved by GenLayer validators.
home.setupBanner: Setup needed: Deploy the contracts and set NEXT_PUBLIC_MARKET_FACTORY_ADDRESS in .env.local.

hotTopics.aiResolvedDesc: GenLayer validators fetch live data and reach consensus to resolve markets.

trading.noWinnings: No winnings to claim on this market.
trading.disclaimer: Trading on testnet. Parimutuel model — winners share the pool. Outcome resolved by GenLayer.

create.title: Create a market
create.question: Market question
create.questionPlaceholder: Will ETH exceed $10,000 before the end of 2026?
create.criteriaPlaceholder: Resolves YES if ETH price exceeds $10,000 USD on Coinbase, Binance, or Kraken at any point before December 31, 2026 00:00 UTC. Resolves NO otherwise.
create.infoHint: GenLayer validators will fetch these URLs and use an LLM to determine the outcome. Be specific about dates, thresholds, and sources.
create.reviewInfo: Creating this market will deploy a smart contract on Arc testnet. Gas is paid in USDC.
create.createdSub: It will appear in the market list shortly.
create.signInRequired: You need to be signed in to suggest a market.
create.criteriaHint: be specific about dates, thresholds, and tie-breakers
create.queueInfo: Your suggestion will be added to the admin review queue. If approved, it will go live as a real market and you'll be notified.
create.successMsg: Suggestion submitted! An admin will review it shortly.

portfolio.connectDesc: Connect to view your portfolio and positions.

about.title: How Genetia works
about.subtitle: Prediction markets with GenLayer resolution and Arc's USDC-native settlement — faster, cheaper, and smarter than anything that came before.

steps.title: Create a market
steps.desc: Set a yes/no question, resolution date, and the criteria GenLayer's AI will use to determine the outcome. Anyone can create.

steps.title: Trade YES or NO
steps.desc: Buy shares with USDC on Arc. Price discovery happens in real-time as traders take positions. Arc settles every trade in under a second.

steps.title: GenLayer resolves
steps.desc: When the market closes, a GenLayer Intelligent Contract fetches live data from the specified sources and uses an LLM to determine the outcome via Optimistic Democracy consensus.

steps.title: Winners paid instantly
steps.desc: The outcome is bridged to Arc. Winners claim their proportional USDC share. No UMA voting, no challenge period — just atomic settlement.

stack.title: Arc Network
stack.desc: EVM-compatible L1. USDC native gas. Sub-second deterministic finality. 30k+ TPS.

stack.title: GenLayer
stack.desc: Python Intelligent Contracts. Fetch live web data. LLM consensus via Optimistic Democracy.

stack.title: Security
stack.desc: Parimutuel pool. 2% protocol fee. Trusted resolver bridge (multisig upgrade planned).

auth.title: Welcome to Genetia
auth.subtitle: Sign in to trade and track your positions.
auth.magicNotConfigured: Email login requires a Magic API key. Add NEXT_PUBLIC_MAGIC_API_KEY to .env.local.
auth.walletNote: Make sure your wallet is set to Arc Testnet (Chain ID 5042002).
auth.magicNote: Non-custodial — only you control your keys.

deposit.title: Add Funds
deposit.subtitle: Send USDC to your wallet address on Arc Testnet.
deposit.warning: Only send USDC on Arc Testnet to this address. Sending on other networks will result in permanent loss.
deposit.faucet: Get testnet USDC from Circle Faucet
deposit.depositSubtitle: Send USDC to your Genetia Wallet address to fund your account.
deposit.notProvisioned: Wallet not yet provisioned. Sign in to create your Genetia Wallet.

admin.title: Admin Dashboard
admin.subtitle: Manage markets, review suggestions, and monitor resolution.
admin.connectDesc: Connect the admin wallet to access market management.
admin.accessDeniedDesc: This page is restricted to the admin wallet.
admin.question: Question
admin.resolveWarning: Admin override — use only if GenLayer resolution fails.
admin.irreversible: This action is irreversible. Make sure the GenLayer resolver has already failed before using this.
admin.setupWarning: Set NEXT_PUBLIC_MARKET_FACTORY_ADDRESS in .env.local after deploying the contracts.
